sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_deltas (elapsed UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY elapsed;
SELECT arrayJoin(elapsed) AS elapsed, formatReadableTimeDelta(elapsed) AS time_delta FROM time_deltas;
UPDATE time_deltas SET elapsed = 1000000 WHERE elapsed = 100;
SELECT formatReadableTimeDelta(elapsed, 'days', 'milliseconds') AS time_delta FROM time_deltas;
